source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free claw hammer on textured drawing paper.

process_strategy: The contact sheet keeps one diagonal hammer while building the handle axis, head and handle silhouette, split claw, wrapped grip, comic impact marks, thick outline, marker fills, and final clarity pass.

final_elements.name: diagonal handle axis and head box guide
final_elements.description: A long diagonal handle line with a block guide for the metal head.

final_elements.name: hammer face, neck, head, and handle silhouette
final_elements.description: A chunky hammer head and straight wooden handle.

final_elements.name: curved split claw and center notch
final_elements.description: A clearly curved two-prong claw opposite the striking face.

final_elements.name: wrapped grip bands and small comic impact marks
final_elements.description: Several grip bands near the handle base and three small burst marks beside the head.

final_elements.name: cyan, orange, magenta, and yellow marker color
final_elements.description: Bold fills on the established head, handle, grip, and impact marks.

frames.visible_job: Places the diagonal handle axis and head box guide.
introduces: diagonal handle axis and head box guide

frames.visible_job: Adds the hammer face, neck, head, and handle silhouette around the guide.
introduces: hammer face, neck, head, and handle silhouette
requires_prior_elements: diagonal handle axis and head box guide

frames.visible_job: Adds the curved split claw and center notch to the existing head.
introduces: curved split claw and center notch
requires_prior_elements: diagonal handle axis and head box guide
hammer face, neck, head, and handle silhouette

frames.visible_job: Adds grip bands and small comic impact marks around established shapes.
introduces: wrapped grip bands and small comic impact marks
requires_prior_elements: hammer face, neck, head, and handle silhouette
curved split claw and center notch

frames.visible_job: Thickens all established contours and fills the existing parts with marker color.
introduces: cyan, orange, magenta, and yellow marker color
requires_prior_elements: hammer face, neck, head, and handle silhouette
curved split claw and center notch
wrapped grip bands and small comic impact marks

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established outlines, claw notch, grip bands, impact marks, and marker fills.

rejection_checks: No face, neck, claw, notch, grip band, impact mark, color, or highlight may first appear in the final image.
The hammer must retain one diagonal pose, scale, and silhouette in every frame.
No late panel may add a nail, board, hand, face, text, sticker border, badge frame, or vector-style gloss.
